column1: * ^ Clāmāvī dē trībulātiōne meā ad Dominum
column2: et exaudīvit mē; dē ventre inferī clāmāvī
column3: et exaudistī vōcem meam. ^ I cried out of my affliction to the Lord
column4: and he heard me: I cried out of the belly of hell
column5: and thou hast heard my voice.

column1: 12 ^ Et prōjēcisti mē in prōfundum in corde maris
And thou hast cast me forth into the deep
column2: in the heart of the sea
column3: and a flood hast compassed me;

column2: et fluctus tuī super mē transiērunt. ^ all thy billows
column3: and thy waves have passed over me.

column1: 10 ^ Et egō dixī: Abjectus sum ā conspectū oculōrum tuōrum; vērumtamen rursus vidēbō templum sanctum tuum. ^
And I said: I am cast away out of the sight of thy eyes: but yet I shall see the holy temple again.
9 ^ Circumdedērunt mē aquae usque ad animam; abissus vallāvit mē
column2: pelagus operuit caput meum. ^  The waters compassed me about even to the soul: the deep hath closed me round about
column3: the sea hath covered my head.

column1: 8 ^ Ad extrēma montium dēscendī; terrae vectēs conclūsērunt mē in aeternum
column2: ^ I went down to the lowest parts of the mountains: the bars of the earth have shut me up for ever

column1: 7 ^ et sublevābis dē corruptiōne vītam meam
column2: Domine Deus meus. ^ and thou wilt bring up my life from corruption

column1: 6 ^ Cum angustiārētur in mē anima mea
column2: Dominī recordātus sum; ^ When my soul was in distress within me

column1: 5 ^ ut veniat ad tē ōrātiō mea
column2: ad templum sanctum tuum. ^ that my prayer may come to thee
misericordiam suam dērelinquunt. ^  They that in vain observe vanities

column1: 3 ^ Egō autem in vōce laudis immolābō tibī; quaecumque vōvī
column2: reddam prō salūte Dominō. ^ But I with the voice of praise will sacrifice to thee: I will pay whatsoever I have vowed for my salvation to the Lord.

column1: 2 ^ Glōria Patrī et Fīliō et Spīrituī Sānctō
column2: ^ Glory to the Father and to the Son and to the Holy Spirit
et in saecula saeculōrum. Āmen. ^ both now and ever
column3: and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
